title: Comparing Values
learning_objective: Use the Ord typeclass's compare function to return an Ordering (LT, EQ, or GT).
hints: See the Ord typeclass in the "Typeclasses 101" section of LYAH — Types and Typeclasses.
compare takes two values and returns an Ordering: LT, EQ, or GT.
Compare the argument against 10: compare x 10.
